_comment: The lockstep enforcement registry — DATA consumed by tools/model-lockstep-gate.mjs (round-27 P1-02). Each record is a model invariant asserted as REALIZED, paired with the EXACT public-entry adversarial-closure conformance check that proves the attack is refused. The gate does NOT infer adversariality from English tokens (round-27 P1-02: a positive check named '...never...' bypassed the old regex); it verifies, per record, that (a) the model still states the claim and (b) the named check exists and (conformance being green) passes. Add an enforcement realization => add a record here, or the exhaustiveness pass fails.

records.model_locus:
every downstream
layer takes the derived context, never raw fields.
records.conformance_check: C1/L1 a raw pinnedPrior alongside a branded context → INVALID(E-AUTHORITY) — the context is the SOLE root (never raw fields, M2; round-26 P0-01)
C1/L2 raw recoveryKeys/recoveryThreshold alongside a branded context → INVALID(E-AUTHORITY) — recovery is genesis-fixed, never injected from a call argument (F.5l; round-26 P0-02)
M3/D getter-TOCTOU on receipt facts cannot mint an EvidenceHandle whose facts ≠ the signed facts → INVALID (round-26 P0-03, L3 closed)
M2/D verifiedGenesisContext: a getter on the genesis (TOCTOU) cannot mint a context whose scope ≠ the verified genesis → null (round-26 D — snapshot once)

records.model_locus: totality includes malformed non-null on EVERY argument
records.conformance_check: round-26 L5 malformed non-null on trailing args: resolveCadence and verifyJson accept a null trailing arg and return structured (no host throw)
round-26 P1-03/L4 resolveByDiscovery THREADS the consumer witness budget (maxWitnessOpMs) through the PUBLIC entry → a tight budget resource-limits the witness, no false served-list HIGH (F.9 ρ_v)

records.model_locus: authority graph crosses the ONE inert snapshot boundary
records.conformance_check: round-27 P0-02 a getter on a checkpoint body cannot sign one body and mint another → INVALID(E-MALFORMED) (the chain crosses the snapshot boundary)

records.model_locus: a budget exhausted on the FINAL awaited leaf
records.conformance_check: round-27 P1-01 a budget exhausted on the FINAL leaf → INDETERMINATE(resource_limit), never reported as pending
CANON-TRANSPARENT: admitDeep is byte-transparent to canon (never looser; byte-identical when accepted) — the input-boundary soundness linchpin
BOUNDARY-GRID: every exported verifier admits its input once (no TOCTOU re-read across the surface — coverage answered in CI, not from memory)
CANON-TRANSPARENT FUZZ: 3000 random inputs (pollution names / non-enumerable / sparse / non-plain proto / deep) — admitDeep is never looser than canon and byte-identical when accepted

records.model_locus: closed at ONE control, not per resolver
records.conformance_check: R3 ONE-CONTROL: admitOpts deep-admits EVERY nested opts/config DATA value once, so a resolver NOT individually patched (verifyEpochTransition) reads its nested doc ≤1 and cannot be shown a second face — the whole nested-doc re-read class is closed at ONE boundary (round-31)

records.model_locus: R3 spans the NESTED input graph
records.conformance_check: R3 NESTED: a two-face NESTED genesis in a resolver opts/config graph → the output is a projection over the VERIFIED face, never the unsigned re-read (round-31 P0-01/02/03; admitOpts is shallow, nested untrusted docs are deep-admitted once)

LOCKSTEP IN-PROCESS: a disabled registered check is CAUGHT in-process — the lockstep validation over the LIVE executed set flags any registered adversarial-closure check absent from THIS run (never a committed, forgeable manifest; round-30 P1-02)

R4 MONOTONIC: the witness budget clock is a monotonic ELAPSED source (performance.now), non-decreasing across reads — a wall-clock/NTP rollback cannot rewind the deadline and disable the whole-op budget (round-30 P1-01; not a wall clock with a wrapper)

records.model_locus: every resolver admits its untrusted input ONCE
records.conformance_check: R3 RESOLVER: resolveKeys admits its genesis ONCE — a two-face Proxy (signed A to verify, tampered B to the reducer) emits keys for the VERIFIED face or errors, NEVER the re-read face

FROM-CODE SIGNATURE REGISTRY: every consumer-surface export has a declared signature (real arity + a valid reachability fixture per position) — no surface export escapes the totality sweep, a new one fails until declared

SOURCE-BOUND MANIFEST: the executed-check manifest carries the sha256 of conformance.mjs and index.mjs — the lockstep gate recomputes them and rejects a stale manifest (evidence content-bound to its source, not trusted by CI order)

R4 CLOCK-OWNED: a hostile __nowMs in public opts is DEAD (never read) — it cannot expand the witness budget or flip resource_limit into a served-list HIGH (round-29 P0-02; ρ_v belongs to the verifier)
R3 NON-BYPASS: a stateful Proxy answering the descriptor one value and [[Get]] another → INVALID, not a false VALID — verify reads the SAME face canon/identity reads
R3 IDENTITY: verify emits id(x̂) bound to the admitted snapshot it verified — the transcript is addressed by the returned id, not by a re-read of the raw input
BOUNDARY-GRID async-aware: a verifier that re-reads its input AFTER an await is OBSERVED as read-count 2 (the grid awaits settlement; a sync snapshot would miss it) — round-29 div1
FROM-CODE PARTITION: every function export is classified surface|exempt (no silent drop — a new export fails until classified)

records.model_locus: hostile Proxy in any argument position
records.conformance_check: FROM-CODE TOTALITY: every consumer-surface export (the classified untrusted-input entries, not a name regex) returns structured, never a host throw, on a hostile Proxy in any argument position

records.model_locus: ONLY an ABSENT budget selects the reference default
records.conformance_check: round-27 P2-01 invalid maxWitnessOpMs (0/-1/NaN/Infinity/fractional) is REFUSED (resource_limit), never expanded to the reference default

records.model_locus: the public evidence-order path is the SAME closed decode as the kernel
records.conformance_check: R32 order cross-kind: transparency-log wearing pow facts {substrate,position} → unproven (its coord is log_id/index)

records.model_locus: a `key-pinned` atom that lifts no Tier
records.conformance_check: R32 Horn≡projectTier: every identity×time cell — max Horn Tier == projectTier

records.model_locus: applies the SAME CLOSED TYPED ADT the kernel's
records.conformance_check: R33 P0-01 signed transparency-log receipt with an EXTRA facts field → INVALID (closed per-kind facts, kernel-aligned)

records.model_locus: the raw-re-read class is closed at this one residual
records.conformance_check: R33 P0-02 issuer_id two-face Proxy → INVALID; issuer_id read from the ADMITTED snapshot R, never a raw re-read

records.model_locus: SWEPT across every signed authority witness
records.conformance_check: R34 P0-02 a checkpoint witness with an unsigned EXTRA sig field → INVALID (closed { body, sig } — no checkpoint-id malleability)
R34 P0-01 a genesis authority carrying a non-canonical Pub32 alias roots NO authority (strict Pub32 before keyId)
